name: issueflow
description: Issue-driven Git Flow-lite workflow skills for Codex, including autonomous cycles, parallel worktree scheduling, and compound learning.

interface.shortDescription: Issue-driven Git Flow-lite workflows for Codex
interface.longDescription: A bundled skill pack for discovering or clarifying issues, planning waves, dispatching worktrees and worker lanes, proving changes, merging safely, and capturing reusable learning.
defaultPrompt: Use issueflow to brainstorm this feature into issues.
Use issueflow to plan the next autonomous wave.
Use issueflow to schedule parallel worktree worker lanes.
Use issueflow to continue the next iteration without waiting idly.
Use issueflow to compound what this merge taught us.
